name: _DoIP_RoutingActivationRequest
title: _DoIP_RoutingActivationRequest
syntax: long _DoIP_RoutingActivationRequest(dword sourceAddress, dword activationType, dword reserved, dword OEM, BYTE sendResponse[], BYTE responseCodeOut[]);
description: A request for routing activation was received in a vehicle simulation. It is possible to ignore, accept or deny the request, and to specify if a response message is sent.

parameters.name: sourceAddress
parameters.description: Logical address of the tester that sent the request.

parameters.name: activationType
parameters.description: The tester has requested this type of connection, e.g. WWH-OBD or default.

parameters.name: reserved
parameters.description: The value of the reserved field in the request message.

parameters.name: OEM
parameters.description: The value of the OEM field in the request, or 0, if field is not present.

parameters.name: sendResponse
parameters.description: Output parameter to indicate whether the simulation shall send a routing activation response message: 0: Do not send a response message 1: Send a response message other: reserved

parameters.name: responseCodeOut
parameters.description: If a response is sent, this value will be used as response code.

availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units
